title: GREYHOUND BUS SERVICES - 211info
text: GREYHOUND PORTLAND GREYHOUND BUS SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides long-distance and international bus service to various locations in the United States, Canada, and Mexico. Discounted fares are available for children, active and retired members of the US Armed Forces, and seniors. Online form to report lost and found or damaged items. 1090 NW Station Way Portland Curbside Bus Stop Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours (800) 231-2222 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (800) 231-2222 Main phone Customer Service Main phone (800) 231-2222 Customer Service Español (800) 531-5332 Customer Service Alternate (800) 752-4841 Customers with Disabilities TTY/TTD (800) 345-3109 INTAKE PROCEDURE: -Visit website or call for more information -Lost & Found or Damaged Items form can be found online by going to the "Help" tab at the top and selecting "Contact Us" FEES: Varies by route Discounted fares include: -Students: 10% discount -Infants ages 0-2: Can ride on adult's lap for no charge -Active and retired members of the US Armed Forces and their spouse and dependents: 10% discount DOCUMENTS: None, unless applying for a military discount; then must provide a valid military picture identification card and family member IDs AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Long Distance Transportation If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. GREYHOUND PORTLAND
